name: Morning Brief — GitHub Trending + Discord Digest

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires every hour. For testing, change to every 1 minute.

nodes.name: GitHub — Search Repos
nodes.notes: Searches GitHub for top JS automation repos. Uses GitHub PAT from credentials store.

nodes.name: Transform — Top 5 Repos
nodes.notes: Sorts by stars, keeps top 5, reshapes each repo into a clean flat object.

nodes.name: Enrich — Fetch README
nodes.notes: For each of the top 5 repos, fetches the README metadata. Runs once per item.

nodes.name: Merge README Snippet
nodes.notes: Decodes base64 README, trims to 280 chars, merges back with repo data.

nodes.name: IF — Stars >= 1000?
nodes.notes: Routes to HOT badge if stars >= 1000, otherwise RISING badge.

nodes.name: Badge — HOT
nodes.notes: Tags repos with 1000+ stars as HOT.

nodes.name: Badge — RISING
nodes.notes: Tags repos with fewer than 1000 stars as RISING.

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM input1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM input2 ORDER BY stars DESC

nodes.name: Merge Branches
nodes.notes: Re-combines HOT and RISING items, sorted by stars.

nodes.name: Build Discord Payload
nodes.notes: Assembles the final Discord webhook payload with rich embeds for each repo.

nodes.name: Discord — Post Digest
nodes.notes: POSTs the digest to Discord. URL stored in credentials — never hard-coded.

nodes.name: Delivery Check / Log
nodes.notes: Checks Discord response; logs success or routes failure for alerting.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Connected via Error Trigger. Catches any unhandled node failure and logs it.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires automatically when any node in the workflow throws an error.
